name: Cadence Design Systems, Inc.
description: Cadence Design Systems, Inc. is a global leader in electronic systems design, providing software, hardware, and intellectual property that enable customers to design complex integrated circuits, printed circuit boards, and electronic systems. The company's Intelligent System Design strategy helps customers in various industries, including consumer electronics, hyperscale computing, 5G communications, automotive, aerospace, and industrial, to deliver innovative products to market faster.
